---
title: "Parent Paper Replication Dataset Builder"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
if (!requireNamespace("data.table", quietly = TRUE)) install.packages("data.table")
if (!requireNamespace("lubridate", quietly = TRUE)) install.packages("lubridate")

library(data.table)
library(lubridate)
```

```{r}
# ---------------------------
# Parameters (edit as needed)
# ---------------------------
input_point_path <- "Datasets/Clean/Crime_Enriched_PointLevel.csv"
output_replication_path <- "Datasets/Clean/Crime_Replication_PrecinctDaily.csv"

# Date window for replication (use NULL to keep full range in data)
start_date <- as.Date("2006-01-01")
end_date <- as.Date("2024-12-31")

# Spatial unit column in point-level file
precinct_col <- "precinct"  # uses addr_pct_cd cast to character in merge_datasets_v2.Rmd

# Crime type mapping (edit to match NYC offense taxonomy)
# Each element is a regex matched against ofns_desc or pd_desc.
crime_type_patterns <- list(
  ASSAULT = "ASSAULT|HARRASSMENT|HARASSMENT|FELONY ASSAULT|OFFENSES AGAINST THE PERSON",
  ROBBERY = "ROBBERY",
  THEFT = "PETIT LARCENY|GRAND LARCENY|LARCENY|THEFT",
  CRIMINAL_DAMAGE = "CRIMINAL MISCHIEF|CRIMINAL DAMAGE|DAMAGE|VANDAL"
)
```

```{r}
# ---------------------------
# Load point-level data
# ---------------------------
dt <- fread(input_point_path)

# Ensure crime_date is Date and precinct is character
dt[, crime_date := as.Date(crime_date)]
dt[, precinct := as.character(get(precinct_col))]

# Drop rows without geo (align with parent paper)
dt <- dt[!is.na(latitude) & !is.na(longitude)]

# Apply date window if set
if (!is.na(start_date)) dt <- dt[crime_date >= start_date]
if (!is.na(end_date)) dt <- dt[crime_date <= end_date]

# Derive crime type from ofns_desc or pd_desc
dt[, crime_type := NA_character_]
for (nm in names(crime_type_patterns)) {
  pat <- crime_type_patterns[[nm]]
  dt[is.na(crime_type) & (grepl(pat, ofns_desc, ignore.case = TRUE) |
                            grepl(pat, pd_desc, ignore.case = TRUE)),
     crime_type := nm]
}

# Keep only mapped crime types (parent paper uses 4 types)
dt <- dt[!is.na(crime_type)]
```

```{r}
# ---------------------------
# Aggregate to precinct-day-crime_type
# ---------------------------
agg <- dt[, .(crime_count = .N), by = .(precinct, crime_date, crime_type)]

# Build full date grid per precinct and crime_type; fill missing with 0
all_dates <- seq(min(agg$crime_date), max(agg$crime_date), by = "day")
grid <- CJ(
  precinct = unique(agg$precinct),
  crime_type = unique(agg$crime_type),
  crime_date = all_dates,
  unique = TRUE
)
setkey(grid, precinct, crime_type, crime_date)
setkey(agg, precinct, crime_type, crime_date)
agg <- agg[grid]
agg[is.na(crime_count), crime_count := 0L]

# Add calendar features
agg[, weekday := wday(crime_date, week_start = 1)]
agg[, month := month(crime_date)]

# Weekend flag (1 weekend, 0 weekday)
agg[, weekend := as.integer(weekday %in% c(6, 7))]
```

```{r}
# ---------------------------
# Join holidays + weather (from point-level daily fields)
# ---------------------------
# Use daily values from point-level file (take first non-NA for each date)
daily_features <- unique(dt[, .(
  crime_date,
  t_mean, t_min, t_max, rh_mean, wind_mean,
  at_mean, tw_mean, di_mean, obs_count,
  weekend, holiday, is_christian_holiday, is_islamic_holiday,
  is_jewish_holiday, is_hindu_holiday
)])

setkey(daily_features, crime_date)
setkey(agg, crime_date)
agg <- daily_features[agg]

# Compute vapor pressure e from T and RH (if available)
if ("t_mean" %in% names(agg) && "rh_mean" %in% names(agg)) {
  agg[, e_mean := (rh_mean / 100) * 6.105 * exp((17.2 * t_mean) / (237.7 + t_mean))]
}
```

```{r}
# ---------------------------
# Historical averages (parent paper features)
# ---------------------------
# Average crime count on weekdays/weekends for each precinct and crime_type
agg[, weekday_avg := mean(crime_count[weekend == 0], na.rm = TRUE),
    by = .(precinct, crime_type)]
agg[, weekend_avg := mean(crime_count[weekend == 1], na.rm = TRUE),
    by = .(precinct, crime_type)]

# Monthly average for each precinct, crime_type, and month
agg[, month_avg := mean(crime_count, na.rm = TRUE),
    by = .(precinct, crime_type, month)]

# Previous day count (lag 1)
setorder(agg, precinct, crime_type, crime_date)
agg[, count_avg := shift(crime_count, 1, type = "lag"),
    by = .(precinct, crime_type)]
agg[is.na(count_avg), count_avg := 0L]
```

```{r}
# ---------------------------
# Output replication dataset
# ---------------------------
fwrite(agg, output_replication_path)
cat("Wrote replication dataset:", output_replication_path, "\n")
```

```{r}
data <- read.csv("C:\\Users\\ekans\\Desktop\\DS340W\\Datasets\\Clean\\Crime_Enriched_PointLevel.csv", nrows = 10)

print(data)
```
